programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Trevor Donovan shares some of his favourite merry memories.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever
programme.desc: Wendy gets into trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school is out.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Celebrities
programme.desc: Ike is being tormented by paranormal forces. Kyle brings in professional ghost hunters to help save his little brother.

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks, uncovering the world's largest conspiracy of all time. Kyle and Stan hit the road in search of the truth and come face-to-face with the masterminds who pulled off the operation.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What's Inside
programme.desc: When Maggie takes on a big case, many of the doctors are worried she's not the right one for the job. Meanwhile, Stephanie makes a mistake treating one of Grey Sloan's own.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: In the Air Tonight
programme.desc: Meredith and Nathan have to confront their feelings when they are stuck sitting next to each other on a plane.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Don't Stop Me Now
programme.desc: Bailey and April work to fix things between Richard and Catherine. Meanwhile, Eliza continues to pursue Arizona, and one of Alex's previous patients returns to Grey Sloan.

programme.title: The Closer: Double Blind
programme.desc: The day has come for Brenda and Fritz to finally wed, but both are a bit preoccupied with work. While they each continue to pursue justice, entanglements on Brenda's squad are a bit too sour to resolve and it may mean someone leaving.

programme.title: The Closer: Products of Discovery
programme.desc: When Brenda's squad investigates the quadruple murder of a family, she accidentally stumbles into the middle of an FBI investigation that may have been a factor in the homicide.

programme.title: The Closer: Blood Money
programme.desc: The apparent kidnapping of a rich financier, under investigation for ripping off investors, leads Brenda's squad to think he may have stage his own abduction.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reloaded
programme.desc: There is little time for adjustment for the newly appointed head of Major Crimes, when the department is rushing to reach a plea regarding a string of grocery store robberies that turns fatal. Meanwhile, Raydor takes a big step to protect Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Before and After
programme.desc: The division works to obtain justice in a brutal homicide, but it turns out to be more complicated than expected. Raydor struggles to gain the respect of her colleagues and to keep supervising Rusty 24/7.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Medical Causes
programme.desc: The facts are blurry in a case involving a fatal car crash in a nightclub. Rusy has to face the harsh reality when Raydor tracks down his mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Megalodon
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into shark infested waters to investigate what drove the sixty foot long Megalodon shark to extinction.

programme.title: Jaws Awakens

programme.desc: Rumor has it that two of the largest sharks in existence have been recently roaming New Zealand waters, but nobody knows which one is the largest. Brandon McMillan and Dickie Chivell are heading out to see which one takes the cake: Phred or Slash.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Shark Trek
programme.desc: Josh Gates links up with his childhood hero, William Shatner, to boldly go where Shark Week has never gone before. The mission: enter shark-infested waters to understand the nature of fear and come face to face with an apex predator. This is Shark Trek.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Acting Chummy
programme.desc: Shark Week 2021 delivers a big bite as Josh talks to legendary William Shatner about their shark encounters. Country music superstar Brad Paisley and 'Krikey, It's the Irwin's' Robert Irwin talk diving shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Truth and Ray'Quan

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the impound lot, a rap star faces problems recovering his promotional truck. Staunch Philly ticket writer Brian seeks solace from irate citizens in his green acre. Garfield gets awful news.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Tiffany tries to find her inner serenity amidst the insults of angry citizens. At the lot, an angry mother tries to free her car after her son borrowed it without permission.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Even comedy can't help two jokesters get their car back from the impound lot. Meanwhile, Marilyn can't find a good man on her ticketing beat, and booters Elissa and Rob face serious mischief on the eve of Halloween.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: As the PPA deals with the tense aftermath of a fatal cop shooting, tow driver Frank is called to the scene of a volatile live stop. Glamorous ticket-writer Marlene encounters a chronic parking violator who ends up at the lot in search of her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot Tracey's extra nice style rubs the desperate owner of an impounded car the wrong way. Ticket writers Brian and Danielle take their football rivalry to the streets. Sherry and Garfield push their luck while booting cars downtown.

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: A Hero's Tail
programme.desc: A cat rescues a young boy from a vicious dog attack, and a K9 Chief puts his life on the line. Plus, a German Shepherd saves her owner during a medical emergency.

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: Creature Crusaders
programme.desc: A sea lion rescues a man who fell from the Golden Gate Bridge, and a German Shepherd leads a State Trooper to a house fire. Plus, a pair of terriers chases a bear that made its way into a home.

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers back to Torrance for an auction that has them battling for the best unit of the day. Ivy changes up his game to stunning results, Brandi puts Jarrod on a harsh budget and Dave takes on Rene against every locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: The Inside Story: Jaws
programme.desc: Celebrate this classic and take a look back at the movie's origins, including the adaptation of a bestseller into the first real 'summer blockbuster' and how Spielberg broke new ground in location filming.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out

programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: NCIS: Grace Period

programme.title: NCIS: Sharif Returns
programme.desc: The team must track down a wanted terrorist who has obtained a missing, highly toxic chemical weapon. As the terrorist taunts them with phone calls, Gibbs and the team unite with Army Lt. Col. Hollis Mann to find him before he attacks American cities.

programme.title: NCIS: Blowback
programme.desc: Ducky comes out of his autopsy room and goes undercover to stop the illegal sale of the navy's top-secret weapon system. Meanwhile, Gibbs' curiosity is peaked when Jenny appears to have a personal vendetta against a wanted man.

programme.title: NCIS: Friends and Lovers
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates when the body of a young sailor is found in an abandoned building in a seedy part of town. Meanwhile, Tony bonds with one of the local detectives working on the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when an ailing navy lieutenant, who is an inspector for the International Atomic Energy Agency, may be the victim of radiation poisoning. Meanwhile, Tony is surprised when he sees a softer side of Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Skeletons
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team look for a potential serial killer when an explosion at a military cemetery mausoleum reveals a cache of dismembered human remains. Meanwhile, Abby turns to Gibbs with a personal problem.

programme.title: NCIS: Iceman
programme.desc: The team investigates when a marine thought to have frozen to death wakes up on Ducky's autopsy table. With the young man on life support, the team tracks his movements in the day before he was left for dead and discovers a secret trip to Baghdad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Inhumane Society
programme.desc: The career of a young boxer is derailed when authorities discover he's at the center of a dog fighting ring. Things get much worse when his partner turns up dead.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Three in One
programme.desc: The body of a real estate agent is discovered in a basement and the investigation points towards three different suspects.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Alligator God

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Death & Taxes
programme.desc: When a prominent tax attorney is found strangled and locked inside a storm shelter, authorities are baffled. As disturbing evidence is uncovered, detectives wonder if those close to him may hold the answers.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Hurricane Homicides
programme.desc: When a mother and daughter are found brutally murdered, detectives wonder if a serial killer is lurking in Palm Beach. With a hurricane bearing down, police race to solve the murders before all the evidence is washed away.

programme.title: Snapped: William Rouse
programme.desc: The truth behind the brutal deaths of a prominent and wealthy couple in Libertyville, IL, remains dormant until 15 years later, when a new police task force exposes a murderer that let money remove their sense of consequence.

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy Campbell Ray

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby

programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes a reality when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve. Detective Waters soon learns this was not the first time the child went missing.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Obsessed with Celeste
programme.desc: 75-year-old retired TV executive Steven Beard is shot in his own home, but his wife, Celeste Beard, didn't pull the trigger. So why is she in prison for his murder? Her mom and husband are hoping Chris and Fatima can find out.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Flames of Passion
programme.desc: Claude Garrett says he tried to rescue his girlfriend, Lorie Lee Lance, from a fire that broke out in their home. But a jury decided he was the one who set the fire with one goal in mind: murder. Chris and Fatima will dig deep to find out what happened.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Body, a Trough, and 800 Pounds of Concrete
programme.desc: Tracy Fortson was the first female deputy sheriff of Oglethorpe County, Georgia. Her life came crashing down when she was convicted of her boyfriend's murder. But her family believes she was framed and want Chris and Fatima to help prove it.

programme.title: Death in the Deep
programme.desc: A new marriage quickly sours aboard a boat in the middle of the sea.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Murder in Cave Creek
programme.desc: Justin Lunsford, convicted of murdering a popular bartender after a night of sex and drugs, insists he's innocent. Now his brother and wife are asking Chris and Fatima to join their fight to free Justin.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Death in the Deep
programme.desc: A new marriage quickly sours aboard a boat in the middle of the sea.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Murder in Cave Creek
programme.desc: Justin Lunsford, convicted of murdering a popular bartender after a night of sex and drugs, insists he's innocent. Now his brother and wife are asking Chris and Fatima to join their fight to free Justin.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Flames of Passion
programme.desc: Claude Garrett says he tried to rescue his girlfriend, Lorie Lee Lance, from a fire that broke out in their home. But a jury decided he was the one who set the fire with one goal in mind: murder. Chris and Fatima will dig deep to find out what happened.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: My Murder Story: The Devil's Angels
programme.desc: A series of mysterious deaths have plagued a small community in Kansas. The thorough investigation of one determined detective reveals a sinister plot and proves that if it takes a village to raise a family, it only takes one person to destroy it.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Children of the Scorn
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest may be full of gloomy weather, but one local family sees only rainbows. Three generations of an established household appear to have it all until a stash of guns and a secret video reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Demon Inside
programme.desc: Charity seems like your typical teenager, she's a popular cheerleader with good grades and and works at the local pizza parlor. But to her mother and sisters, Charity is possessed by a demon that needs to be dealt with.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Criss-Cross Killer
programme.desc: When Veronica Bozza's body is found bleeding on her living room floor, it sends shockwaves through the close-knit community of Bridgewater. The murder plot leads Nashville's finest to uncover a bizarre unexpected twist right out of a Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble
programme.desc: Failing to stop Kim Il Sung's forces on land, MacArthur devises an amphibious assault at Inchon with the intelligence aid of naval officer Lt. Eugene Clark.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: PMC
programme.desc: Explore private military contractors, revealing how they operate and why the government can no longer wage modern warfare without them.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: The Unit
programme.desc: Explore America's most secretive and deadly unit, Delta Force. Get an inside look at their deadly missions to take down some of the world's greatest threats.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: Forecon
programme.desc: Inside Special Ops explores the Force Reconnaissance companies, providing an inside look at their extreme training programs and deadly stealth missions around the world.

programme.title: Secrets of Diplomatic Security
programme.desc: They are the front lines of United States Diplomacy: Special Agents of the State Department's highly secretive protective force called Diplomatic Security. Go deep inside this clandestine force and learn secrets never before revealed to the public.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Water Damage Be Gone
programme.desc: Tamara Day restores neglected large homes, and helps families to love them again.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tile and More Tile

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Kitchen Drop In
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Cashiers, North Carolina, to build an antique log cabin in the middle of a huge, framed-out modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Reclaiming a One-Room Log Schoolhouse
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders go deep in the holler to reclaim a rare one-room log schoolhouse full of history. Back on the bone yard, the schoolhouse gets a whole new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: West Virginia Legacy Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work on saving the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home. Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Good Eats: Peachy Keen
programme.desc: Chef and scientist Alton Brown shares peachy secrets.

programme.title: Good Eats: Squash Court II
programme.desc: Alton Brown cooks with summer squash.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montreal
programme.desc: Known as the City of Saints, Montreal, Canada, is blessed with a cuisine formed by global flavours. From poutine to smoked meat to hand-rolled bagels, Andrew Zimmern digs in to the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading to Quebec.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Charleston, Sc
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, SC, and his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food. Then, he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern unveils must-have eats in Birmingham, Alabama. This southern city cherishes soul food classics like fried catfish and hushpuppies, barbecued chicken slathered in sauce, crunchy fried green tomatoes and refreshingly cool pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sitka
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Sitka, Alaska, where the preparation of iconic Alaskan staples like king salmon, venison and rockfish has evolved with finesse.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game III: Oysters
programme.desc: Oysters are a mystery to many and downright spooky to some. Join host Alton Brown as he unravels the secrets of this bivalve, cracks a safe or two and reinvents classic applications.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful II
programme.desc: These days we're all looking for ways to make more out of less. Alton Brown's favorite strategy: flatten meats wafer thin and cover them with flavor. New looks at old classics like chicken Kiev, turkey piccata and beef paillard.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: The cocktail is a truly American art form that few Americans know much about. Alton sets up the basics of a bar, contemplates ice as an ingredient and properly prepares three classics that open the door to the world of cocktail mixology.

programme.title: Good Eats: House of the Rising Bun
programme.desc: Chef/ scientist Alton Brown whips up tasty breakfast breads.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pop Culture
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown investigates modern movie popcorn.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos

programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pugtastic Day With Grandma
programme.desc: The pugs stay at Bob's mother's house while he goes out of town.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Sleeps/ Fireworks School
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Three musically inclined chipmunks, Alvin, Simon and Theodore, meet frustrated songwriter David Seville and impress him with their singing talent.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sister Act/ House Flip
programme.desc: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other. After causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Boss Maybe/ Family's Bonding
programme.desc: Leni takes over for Lori as the family babysitter, but struggles to live up to her. The Loud's get new neighbours, but when they start acting suspicious, secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pasture Bedtime/ Shop Girl
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Band Together/ Blinded by Science
programme.desc: Luna has to decide between playing in a band with her friends or playing with professionals. After searching for her next big scientific breakthrough, Lisa discovers Flip is a marvel of modern science.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cow Pie Kid/ Saved By the Spell
programme.desc: Luna has to decide between playing in a band with her friends or playing with professionals./ After searching for her next big scientific breakthrough, Lisa discovers Flip is a marvel of modern science.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy and Haiku compete to be the new president of the Young Mortician's Club at school. Leni worries about her friendship with Miguel and Fiona when she's promoted to temporary manager at work.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fuss/ Resident
programme.desc: Lincoln and his friends try to find another way to school after a run in with the 8th grade bullies on the bus./ Lincoln and Clyde are at odds when they discover there’s only room for one of their grandmas at Sunset Canyon.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Strife of the Party/Kernel of Truth
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kings of the Con
programme.desc: The girls get more attention when accompany Lincoln and Clyde to the Ace Savvy convention dressed as the Full deck.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Battle of the Grandpas/ Prankaversary
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Saving Face/ Matters of the Kart
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid are determined to find out if the new building tenant is their favorite wrestler – La Tormenta.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: Middlemost Post: First Delivery/ Chore or Less
Fairly OddParents: Spring Break-Up/ Dimmsdale Daze
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe wish their families could go camping together, which starts a feud between their parents. Chloe wishes that she could be a parent so that she can go to the Dimmsdale Daze carnival with Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hail to the Chief/ Twistory
programme.desc: Timmy decides to run for Student Body President to capture the affections of Trixie Tang.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Problem/ Power Mad
programme.desc: Timmy wants to do 'adult' things; Chester and AJ are stranded in virtual reality.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crime Wave/ Odd Ball
programme.desc: Timmy leaves his favourite comic book by the tub; Timmy becomes a ball boy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Add-a-Dad/ Squirrely Puffs
programme.desc: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up 'a-lot-a-dads' to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chicken Poofs/ Stupid Cupid
programme.desc: Poof gets the chicken poofs and turns everyone into chickens; Timmy takes Cupid's arrows.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Three musically inclined chipmunks, Alvin, Simon and Theodore, meet frustrated songwriter David Seville and impress him with their singing talent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: Movie: UglyDolls
programme.desc: A group of free-spirited dolls sets out on an adventure to find love and to confront what it means to be different from the norm.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Balancing Act / Dawkins Strikes Back
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Second Temple/ Barrel's Warhammer
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy's quest to get home takes them to an icy mountain temple. Sasha and Grime embark on a quest to retrieve a legendary war hammer.

programme.title: Movie: UglyDolls
programme.desc: A group of free-spirited dolls sets out on an adventure to find love and to confront what it means to be different from the norm.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Jack Skater Guy
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mark on Fire
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
programme.desc: Lain’s Blading prowess seems to be the stuff of myth. But that doesn’t matter to Hyuga — he’s ready to go head-to-head anyway! When he does, he learns something incredible about Lain’s Bey, Vex Lucius.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.
