programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: Frasier: Here's Looking at You
programme.desc: Martin uses a telescope to scope out a romantic interest in the adjacent building.

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier throws a dinner party to showcase his new painting, only to have the artist declare it a forgery. His attempt at retribution is foiled by a frightened Niles.

programme.title: Frasier: Call Me Irresponsible
programme.desc: After advising a caller to break up with his girlfriend, Frasier begins dating her.

programme.title: Reba: Date of Mirth
programme.desc: Barbra Jean confesses to Reba that she has a serious crush on her marriage counsellor.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Realtor
programme.desc: Brock reluctantly agrees to let Reba handle the sale of his precious condo.

programme.title: Reba: Flowers for Van
programme.desc: Reba is drawn into the world of on-line poker, but has no idea who her competitor is.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Hallmark star Jonathan Bennet is here.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Double Holiday
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with throwing her companies holiday party, with her nemesis. The two must work together to mingle work and traditions to make the party a success.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: A woman is hired to decorate an estate building a few weeks before Christmas. While there, she works to break down the wall between her and the business owner, all while keeping the holiday spirit alive.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: The Office: The Meeting
programme.desc: Michael starts to feel insecure and defensive after a request from Jim. Dwight convinces Toby to look into Darryl's worker's comp claim. Pam tries to deal with the guest list of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: The Promotion
programme.desc: David lets everyone know that not everyone will be getting a raise. Dwight finally hits his breaking point with Jim and looks around the office for support. Pam asks for cash instead of wedding gifts.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Pam deals with Andy's sensitive injury; Kevin loses his shoes on the day of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Mafia
programme.desc: An insurance salesman meets with Michael and Dwight and Andy convince him that the salesman is part of the mafia. Pam's painting is accidentally ruined by Erin.

programme.title: The Office: The Lover
programme.desc: Michael reveals the identity of the woman he is dating to Jim and Pam. Dwight apologizes to Jim for tormenting him over the years with an odd peace offering.

programme.title: The Office: Koi Pond
programme.desc: The office plans a haunted house for the children of the community. Michael falls into a koi pond while at an important meeting. Pam and Andy try cold calling for more sales.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?

programme.title: South Park: Probably

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Human Cent-iPad

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons

programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces
programme.desc: We travel all of the country redefining and redesigning space. Inspiring viewers to take on all home improvement challenges and decorating dilemmas.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Leave It Inside
programme.desc: April and Andrew consult with a fiery patient who has a giant, inoperable heart tumor. Meanwhile, Alex and Eliza are at odds over the treatment of a young patient, and Stephanie and Ben make decisions that could affect their careers.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: True Colors
programme.desc: The doctors of Grey Sloan encounter a difficult case involving a dangerous patient. Meanwhile, Owen receives life-changing news that pushes Amelia to step up to support him, and Alex attends a medical conference after making a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: The doctors' lives are at risk after a dangerous patient escapes the hospital room. Alex must make a hard choice in his relationship with Jo while Meredith has some big news for Nathan that brings things to a turning point.

programme.title: The Closer: Red Tape
programme.desc: Sgt. Gabriel shoots a murder suspect he is certain is armed and firing at him, but the evidence doesn't seem to match up. A Force Investigator is sent in to check things out, interfering with Brenda's murder investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Walking Back the Cat
programme.desc: Brenda and her squad are temporarily deputized into the FBI when a missing persons case turns into a full-blown murder investigation involving drug trafficking at gay dance parties.

programme.title: The Closer: Half Load
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former gangbanger that may not have been the target.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Ecstasy and the Agony
programme.desc: A homicide case involves the Israeli mob and a self-proclaimed 'intuitive life strategist.' In a rare display of vulnerability, Provenza opens up to a suspect. Meanwhile, Rusty's first day of school doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: In a case involving a kidnapping-turned-homicide, the squad is pressured to work quickly. Meanwhile, DNA evidence proves that Rusty has a close tie to the justice system.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: When a fatal shooting occurs in gang territory, Capt. Raynor makes a bold move that could jeopardize her career. Rusty claims that he doesn't care to meet his biological father.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: The Sharks of Headstone Hell
programme.desc: Shark experts investigate the behaviour of tiger sharks.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Shark Trek: Sharkmania
programme.desc: Josh Gates links up with William Shatner to boldly go where Shark Week has never gone before.

programme.title: Mothersharker
programme.desc: It's a great mystery where tiger sharks give birth. One team of scientists deploys an arsenal of new technology to find out, but they need to meet some of Bahamas' biggest tiger shark mothers face-to-face for it to work.

programme.title: Brad Paisley's Shark Country
programme.desc: Country star Brad Paisley and comedian JB Smoove meet in the Bahamas to attract new fans, Sharks. With Dr. Austin Gallagher's help, they put Brad's musical talents to the test in shark-infested waters to see how sound can attract or repel sharks.

programme.title: The Spawn of El Diablo
programme.desc: In 2012, Michelle Jewell documented one of the largest great white mating scars ever recorded. Recently similar marks have appeared, leading her to believe this is a possible mating ground and that mega-shark El Diablo has returned to South Africa.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Now You Sea Me
programme.desc: The Shark Week 2021 waves continue as Josh sits down with comedian JB Smoove, actor/director/comedian Kevin Smith and star of the new series Shark Academy, Riley Elliott. Josh chats with shark expert Alison Towner.

programme.title: Sharks Among Us
programme.desc: As shark encounters increase around the globe, Dr. Craig O'Connell believes he has developed a solution that will prove once and for all that sharks and people can peacefully coexist and live.

programme.title: Bloodline: The Spawn of Jaws
programme.desc: Over four decades ago, great white sharks off Long Island gave rise to the legend of 'Jaws.' All those sharks were caught and killed. Dr. Craig O’Connell believes the bloodline still lives and is searching for the 'Spawn of Jaws.'

programme.title: Laws of Jaws: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Five heart-stopping real-life experiments will separate shark fact and fiction, including electronics to trigger a shark encounter and sharks investigating paddleboards that may cause you to fall off. Watch and learn to navigate these dangerous waters.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Shark Week
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ocean, danger lurks just below the surface. A great white shark stalks a mother enjoying a day at the beach, and a massive tiger shark ambushes a local fisherman in Hawaii. Both victims must fight for their lives to reach safety onshore.

programme.title: Ninja Sharks
programme.desc: Examine six sharks with unique adaptations that have evolved over millions of years, making them the most lethal hunters in the sea.

programme.title: Sharkwrecked: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Parachuting in to Pacific and some of the sharkiest waters on earth, Paul de Gelder and James Glancy must try to make it back to shore alive.

programme.title: Sharks of Ghost Island
programme.desc: Locals abandoned Ghost Island after multiple shipwrecks and shark attacks. Now, Dr. Craig O'Connell and his team of experts dive in to find out why the island at the edge of the Bermuda Triangle attracts so many sharks, including the Great White.

programme.title: The Return of the Monster Mako
programme.desc: Professional shark tagger Keith Poe and marine biologists Greg Stuntz, Matt Ajemain and their team use state-of-the-art technology to document a live predation by a 1,000-pound mako shark, what fishermen call a 'grander.'

programme.title: Mothersharker
programme.desc: It's a great mystery where tiger sharks give birth. One team of scientists deploys an arsenal of new technology to find out, but they need to meet some of Bahamas' biggest tiger shark mothers face-to-face for it to work.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Shark Trek
programme.desc: Josh Gates links up with his childhood hero, William Shatner, to boldly go where Shark Week has never gone before. The mission: enter shark-infested waters to understand the nature of fear and come face to face with an apex predator. This is Shark Trek.

programme.title: Phelps vs. Shark: Great Gold vs. Great White
programme.desc: Sharks, the world's fastest and most efficient predators. Michael Phelps, our greatest champion to ever get in the water. A 'Shark Week' first brings an event so monumental no one has ever attempted it before.

programme.title: Tiffany Haddish Does Shark Week
programme.desc: Tiffany Haddish hosts Shark Week! While her fantasy was to uncover the secrets of shark sex sailing on the fanciest yachts, surrounded by friendly sea creatures and pampered by a handsome merman, she's in for the sharkiest of wake-up calls.

programme.title: Brad Paisley's Shark Country
programme.desc: Country star Brad Paisley and comedian JB Smoove meet in the Bahamas to attract new fans, Sharks. With Dr. Austin Gallagher's help, they put Brad's musical talents to the test in shark-infested waters to see how sound can attract or repel sharks.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Kick in the Head
programme.desc: Ashley visits Jonah, and they discuss his parents' ultimatum for him to find a full time job and move out of the house. He's got a promising interview lined up, but Trent and Amber may not approve of his new career choice.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: I Only Poop Twice a Week
programme.desc: Tensions are coming to a head at the Johnston home as Anna, Jonah and Liz plan to move out of the house, while Trent and Amber try to teach them the skills they need to succeed on their own. Meanwhile, Trent gets a visit from a childhood friend.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: I'm a Huge Wimp
programme.desc: Trent and Amber are both celebrating birthdays, and the kids plan a big surprise for them. Meanwhile, despite their recent arguments, Jonah approaches Trent for help with his new job.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Liz Leaves the Nest
programme.desc: Elizabeth is the first Johnston child to move out into her own house. Anna hopes to be close behind, but she may not have convinced her parents that she's responsible enough.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: What's Your Surprise?
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Chris and Amy reminisce about their relationship as they get closer to their wedding date. Matt makes a big mistake in readying the farm for Amy's summer wedding. Zach and Tori have a huge secret they're finally ready to share!

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Hearts and Heads
programme.desc: The Derricos make their way to Los Angeles for Diez's skull surgery, but the trip gets off to a rocky start when the family's rental property isn't what they expected. Then, a last-minute change to the hospital's COVID protocols leaves Deon in disbelief.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Lit Christmas
programme.desc: With Diez's surgery to reconstruct his skull fast approaching, Deon wants Christmas to be extra special this year, but an unexpected expense puts his plans in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the family's grueling nanny search comes to a surprising end.

programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Split Decision
programme.desc: Joanne has been held back from success because of her forehead growth. Shakisaha split her left earlobe after stretching it with gauges. Mike is a tough guy with a soft bump on his head. Dania's rhinophyma has kept her from enjoying her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Big Pop on Campus

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pain in the Neck

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cyster, Cyster

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Fault in Our Scars

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out

programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Perfect Stormi
programme.desc: Kourtney lashes out at her mom over issues from the past, Khloé is devastated by an unexpected loss, and Kylie welcomes her first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: An American Model in Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is furious when Kim leaks some personal information about her to the family. Meanwhile Kim struggles to make Kanye a priority, and Kendall lets loose on a whirlwind trip to Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take Japan
programme.desc: Kim scrambles to shoot an entire Yeezy season seven campaign while in Japan, but worries that her sisters' questionable fashion sense might jeopardize the debut of the line.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let's Play Ball!
programme.desc: The Kardashians take on the Jacksons in a charity softball game. Meanwhile, Kris pools her resources to renovate the Watts Empowerment Center, and Khloé and Scott devise a clever plan to reveal Art Vandelay's true identity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Joshua Jackson and AnnaSophia Robb make an appearance to chat about their creepy true crime series, 'Dr. Death'.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Khloé and Tristan head back to LA with baby True. Unresolved tension lingers between Kim and Tristan due to his infidelity. Kourtney travels to DC to talk with Congress. Kim heads to Vegas with her girlfriends prove she's still a wild girl.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck
programme.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs, and Kendall worries she'll humiliate herself in a charity poker tournament.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Chicago Loyalty
programme.desc: Kim's fierce loyalty to her husband becomes a source of conflict while on a trip to Chicago. Kourtney struggles with anxiety in the aftermath of her breakup, so her sisters decide to plan a girls trip to Palm Springs to cure her breakup blues.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chopped: Big Hitters
programme.desc: Four chefs from America's baseball stadiums arrive in the Chopped kitchen. In the first basket they get typical game eats, including Italian sausage.

programme.title: Chopped: Dill Dilemma
programme.desc: Flavours will clash in the Chopped kitchen when the first basket challenges chefs to bring a dill pickle-flavoured treat into their dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Under the Cuban Sun
programme.desc: Four chefs with personal connections to Cuba are treated to ingredient baskets filled with a variety of Cuban foods.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweet and Sour Notes
programme.desc: Four chefs embrace a sweet-and-sour theme and seek to harmonize opposite flavors on their plates. A furious first round has them racing to figure out what to do with a ready-to-serve soup and three other basket finds.

programme.title: Chopped: Alton's Maniacal Baskets: Part 4
programme.desc: Alton Brown is at it again. The chefs in his Maniacal Baskets tournament are seriously tripped up by a canned wonder in the appetizer round, and a shelf-stable surprise in the entree basket is unlikely to be a crowd pleaser.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bagel Attraction
programme.desc: Alton Brown dives into the history, science and technique of making bagels at home.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Man
programme.desc: Alton Brown explores the world of fermentation.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Classics
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting her own spin on some of her favourite dishes to make a fun meal for Nick and her dad. The menu includes Molly's Chicago dog meatloaf with mustard glaze, a salt-and-vinegar potato galette and wedge salads with bacon and feta cream.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Brunch All Day
programme.desc: Molly is having a brunch party with a few of her former bridesmaids. She makes blueberry blintzes, a breakfast salad with soft cooked eggs and crispy walnut sausage patties.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Yeh-Hagen Family Games
programme.desc: Molly Yeh kicks off the first official Yeh-Hagen Family Games with a big, delicious bang. She makes carnitas walking tacos and Mexican street corn-loaded tots, and for dessert, there are coconut mango pops and ooey-gooey s'mores brownies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mecca of the Midwest
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a decadent Midwest meal in honor of her hometown, Chicago. She starts with sausage, peppers and onion deep dish pizza and Chicago corn dog bites, and then she makes sweet and salty caramel and cheddar popcorn mix and mint truffle bars.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Chicken
programme.desc: It's chicken all ways as Ree Drummond whips up four quick and easy chicken dinners. For company, she makes Mustard Herb Chicken Cutlets and Garlic Spinach.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: New Favorites
programme.desc: For Ree Drummond, it's out with the old and in with new favorites that are all quick and easy. She makes over a cowboy classic, Flank Steak with Herb Sauce and Three-Cheese Waffle Hash Browns.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Take Five
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making four meals on four days, and they all have just five ingredients. For breakfast, she whips up Chilaquiles, a Mexican breakfast with Osage County style.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Game Food
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is dishing up great ideas for quick and easy game-day dishes. First, she knocks mashups out of the park with five-cheese Pepperoni Pizza Queso.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranchin' and Cookin'
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is geared up for an action-packed morning of ranching and get-ahead cooking. She stocks the freezer with a marvelous meatball and polenta casserole, awesome everything bagel bombs with everything bagel seasoning.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 3 Apps and a Cocktail
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has cocktail hour and a summer party on her mind. She puts her ranch kitchen spin on a BBQ shrimp cocktail, makes irresistible buffalo chicken meatball skewers, bakes bacon ranch cheesy bread and mixes up blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Chocolate Games

programme.desc: Actor Justin Hartley wants to give back to his buddy, Mat, who he credits for being the rock that saved him in rough times. Justin teams up with Jonathan and Drew Scott to transform Mat's dated backyard into a stunning outdoor oasis for his entire family.

programme.desc: Syd wants the amigas to become closer friends with Harry. The only problem is she’s putting way too much pressure on herself to make sure things go perfectly when they hang out.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Wesley and the Fischman
programme.desc: Gabby has to choose between keeping her new alien-babysitting gig a secret and risking it all by confiding in her extraterrestrial-obsessed best friend, Wesley.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Man! I Feel Like a Genius
programme.desc: When Olive is moved into an advanced math class, Syd pushes to be in the same class but quickly realizes math isn't really her strongest subject.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Tesscue Me

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sharp Job-jects

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Jessie: All the Knight Moves
programme.desc: When Jessie discovers that Zuri is a chess prodigy, she urges her to compete in a renowned competition. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma suspect that Bertram was once a jewel thief.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Meatball-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Willow helps Maddie send in a video application for a basketball scholarship. When Willow gets notified that she has received a scholarship and Maddie hasn't heard yet, Maddie gets jealous and blows up at Willow.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ask-Her-More-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv gets upset when an interview focuses on her appearance instead of her acting. She enlists her friend Kristen Bell to help her change the conversation.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Relationships and Red Carpets
programme.desc: Austin and Ally are forced to hide their relationship from the public by Austin's music label, causing their relationship to hit another roadblock. Dez contemplates moving to L.A. to attend film school to be closer to his girlfriend.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Buzzcuts and Beginnings
programme.desc: The gang is reunited at Ally's concert, but when Austin realizes that the reunion is only temporary, he contemplates enrolling in military school.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie Goes to Hollywood
programme.desc: When Christina Ross returns home, Jessie heads to L.A. for a role in a movie. When the kids realize that they still need her, however, they follow Jessie to Hollywood.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny

programme.title: Sofia the First: Princess Adventure Club

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Smith
programme.desc: When the half-dressed, partially frozen body of a Navy veteran is found lying in a ditch, rumors and lies will challenge detectives' efforts to lay bare the truth behind the chilling death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Blind Justice
programme.desc: For investigators, motive can be the hardest thing to find. This crime took place in Florida but detectives didn't discover a motive for murder until they looked into a tropical island thousands of miles away, where a festering grudge was born.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea
programme.desc: When a celebration starts to sour, tempers flare and someone vanishes. Days later, a body is discovered in an unsavory part of a Northern California town. When the case goes cold, it will take a most unexpected plea to finally catch a killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Smokey Mountain Murders
programme.desc: It's quitting time in the Smokey Mountains of Tennessee and a group of fellas bellies up to a local bar. But when moods shift, someone will wind up dead. And when another local mysteriously goes missing, neighbors fear a killer is hiding among them.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Party Crashers
programme.desc: Some college buddies crash a party in an idyllic Southern California town. But when alcohol flows and jealousy rages, the night turns deadly. The case goes cold for more than a decade before the truth is finally uncovered and justice is served.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: She was beautiful, trusting and troubled. The young woman from a prominent family was just turning it around and realizing her promise. Then she vanished. When the police seemed unable to find her, her family hatched a plan to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Lover's Chair
programme.desc: A couple's romantic evening atop Rockefeller Lookout in New Jersey ends with the wife's tragic death. Her death is ruled an accident, but a decade later investigators uncover a web of lies forcing them to take another look at the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Relentless
programme.desc: A Texas woman's apparent suicide devastates the family that she leaves behind. But after one investigator dedicates decades to solving the mystery of what drove her to make such a tragic decision, a truth that is far more sinister is discovered.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a rural Nebraska town when their beloved high school volleyball coach dies in a fiery car accident. But as investigators reconstruct her tragic death, the resulting clues steer the investigation to reveal a horrifying series of events.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Vanished with the Tides
programme.desc: A Florida man's body washes ashore on idyllic Cocoa Beach, the apparent victim of an accidental drowning. But as investigators pull back the layers of the victim's personal life, a far murkier truth is revealed.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: In the early morning hours after Valentine's Day a man is found dead after an apparent drug overdose. But a jail informant gives investigators a tip that abruptly changes the case, and a deadly pattern of deaths in the family is revealed.

programme.title: Snapped: Raynella Leath
programme.desc: A widow and her stepdaughter accuse each other of murder, but only one goes on trial for her life.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Cobb
programme.desc: A brutal fight leaves a New York woman fighting for her life and her freedom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Life on the Fast Lane

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Crepes of Wrath

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: Lost Roman Megastructures
programme.desc: The infamous scandals of Nero and his lost palace and the brutal theaters of the coliseums were majestic symbols of a sprawling Roman empire. Archaeologists use cutting-edge tech to uncover the engineering secrets behind these ancient megastructures.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Executioner
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston explores the incredible story of Johann Reichhart, a German state-appointed judicial executioner who, after leading a merciless Nazi killing machine during WWII, served the Allies to execute Nazi war criminals.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Executioner
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston explores the incredible story of Johann Reichhart, a German state-appointed judicial executioner who, after leading a merciless Nazi killing machine during WWII, served the Allies to execute Nazi war criminals.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Executioner
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston explores the incredible story of Johann Reichhart, a German state-appointed judicial executioner who, after leading a merciless Nazi killing machine during WWII, served the Allies to execute Nazi war criminals.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Lost Coliseums
programme.desc: The coliseums of Rome were brutal theaters of spectacle and death that helped control the sprawling Roman empire. Now, archaeologists uncover the engineering secrets behind these majestic structures to reveal the truth behind the ancient Roman world.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Pit of Doom NYC
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly sucks a man through a Brooklyn crosswalk, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Wrath of the Jersey Devil
programme.desc: When a devastating sinkhole tears through a family's property in New Jersey, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more sinkholes.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Gotham's Gates of Hell
programme.desc: When swarms of sinkholes strike New York City, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastation and prevent these hellish pits from threatening more of the Big Apple.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: When a deadly man-eating sinkhole consumes a Florida house, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Florida Hell Hole
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Skyscraper vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: A skyscraper sinking into the earth, the world's strongest wall in crisis, and a deadly bridge are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sinkhole at the Museum
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole swallows millions of dollars of legendary automobiles at the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Expert geologists investigate and reveal how an enormous cave system could remain undetected and poised for catastrophic destruction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Devil's Dam
programme.desc: When a dam breaks during routine maintenance, engineers fear a catastrophic flood. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how a simple miscalculation could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Missing Hotelier
programme.desc: When a two-bit Florida criminal is arrested driving a stolen convertible with blood in the backseat and its owner, a 49-year-old hotelier named Sabine Musil-Buehler is reported missing, the case expands to include a possible homicide.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Trial by Violence
programme.desc: A father lunges at a serial killer; a defendant attempts to stab an attorney; an Alaskan wildlife enthusiast is tased; a daughter yells at her father's killer; a man threatens a female judge; a defendant walks out of his trial; a man lights up in court.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: A woman is murdered the same night she's supposed to go out with rising star, Ashton Kutcher. Police believe the clues point to a serial killer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Suspects at Large
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes, her friend investigates but then disappears herself. Are the men in their social circle responsible? Then, a dancer dies by gunshot, and a lit cigarette could be the clue that targets a killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: In Florida, a man is shot dead with a single bullet to the chest. It looks like a murder, but the inquiry takes a surprising turn. In Oklahoma, a high-speed pursuit turns rescue mission as the chase ends in a fiery crash.

programme.title: Body Cam: No Surrender
programme.desc: A car crash ignites a fireball that threatens a Maryland officer making a traffic stop. In Ohio, an armed burglar hides in a closet, and officers must smoke him out. In Texas, an officer confronts a wanted felon who suddenly pulls a gun on him.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Suspects at Large
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes, her friend investigates but then disappears herself. Are the men in their social circle responsible? Then, a dancer dies by gunshot, and a lit cigarette could be the clue that targets a killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: In Florida, a man is shot dead with a single bullet to the chest. It looks like a murder, but the inquiry takes a surprising turn. In Oklahoma, a high-speed pursuit turns rescue mission as the chase ends in a fiery crash.

programme.title: Body Cam: No Surrender
programme.desc: A car crash ignites a fireball that threatens a Maryland officer making a traffic stop. In Ohio, an armed burglar hides in a closet, and officers must smoke him out. In Texas, an officer confronts a wanted felon who suddenly pulls a gun on him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Dance
programme.desc: When a bright, young, exotic dancer is found dead at the bottom of a 12-story bridge, detectives must determine if it's a suicide or the work of a sinister character who wanted more than a dance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home after a day spent helping friends move apartments. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Single mom Christina Sanoubane, leaves Jacob Crosson, her abusive boyfriend and father of her two year old son Corbin, to move into her own apartment. But four days later when a friend comes to visit her, Corbin greets him with the words: 'Mommy's dead.'

programme.title: Dead of Night: Kill Me Twice
programme.desc: Allentown, PA loses all sense of security when a calculated serial killer starts preying on unsuspecting women in the middle of the night. When one woman refuses to be his next victim, the killer goes on a relentless tirade that ends in his own demise.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: What Happened in the Woods
programme.desc: A party in the woods ends in tragedy when the body of 18-year-old Jarret Clark is found floating in a lake. With many people camping in the Oklahoma wilderness that night, it's only a matter of time before agents come across a key witness to the crime.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Long Arm of the Law
programme.desc: When two unrelated murders are traced to a violent pair of siblings, investigators are led on a wild goose chase, across two countries. It's a case that will consume not only the Tyler and Smith County authorities, but the U.S. Marshals and FBI.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Genius
programme.desc: A beautiful wife is dead from nicotine poisoning and her husband needs to beat the murder rap.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: Predator at Large: He's Gonna Do It to Your Daughter
programme.desc: The peace of Raynham, Massachussets is forever shattered when cheerleader Mary Lou Arruda goes missing two days after her 15th birthday. The vast search effort to find her ends nine weeks later in the Freetown Forest, with a chilling discovery.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Cold Heart
programme.desc: On a snowy Wisconsin morning, an 18-year-old mother is found beaten, stabbed and strangled to death with her 3 month old son as her only witness. Leads soon grow cold and the chase for a suspect leads detectives to a vicious killer who's close to home.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Get Off on the Pain
programme.desc: Meredith struggles to come up with a new plan for Owen's sister. Jo makes a surprising choice regarding Alex, and Andrew's sister's controversial research leads to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Harper Avery arrives at Grey Sloan, putting Bailey on edge. A familiar face from Meredith's past returns as a patient, and Amelia tries to manage a secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Tapped Out
programme.desc: Brenda's team investigates the shooting death of a popular online 'hook-up king.'

programme.title: The Closer: Strike Three
programme.desc: A major shootout leaves two patrol cops and an 18-year-old neo-Nazi dead. The investigation is made more difficult by the involvement of Capt. Sharon Raydor of Force Investigation Division.

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Shame Game
programme.desc: Major Crimes struggles to keep important documents from leaking. A situation proves extremely uncomfortable for Capt. Raydor, when the Department of Children and Family Services tracks down Rusty's biological father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dismissed With Prejudice
programme.desc: When a murder conviction is overturned after eight years, Tao is forced to question his past actions. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to be himself during his first outing with his father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cheaters Never Prosper
programme.desc: A man from Las Vegas is found dead after an apparent overdose but the facts become unclear as details begin to unfold. Meanwhile, a series of strange events leave Rusty and Raydor wondering if Dunn can be trusted.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
